verdict_reason: Critical missing mock for config.js will cause server initialization to fail; major assertion weakness in amendNotification call verification.

todos.issue: Missing config.js mock — every controller test must mock both get-oidc-config.js and config.js per best-practices
todos.fix: Add vi.mock('../../config/config.js', ...) with mockAuthConfig helper as shown in notification-view controller test

todos.issue: Uses expect.anything() for request and logger arguments instead of asserting structure — passes even if critical arguments are malformed
todos.fix: Replace first two expect.anything() with expect.objectContaining() to assert request and logger shapes match what amendNotification needs
